overrides.text: persistence MUST be the in-memory store, not a database
overrides.justification: The @prisma/client dependency exists in the repository template but is not used by the slug implementation. The slug function only uses lodash/kebabCase for in-memory string processing, satisfying the constraint that persistence must be in-memory.

overrides.text: Authentication / users / authorization are out of scope
overrides.justification: The next-auth dependency exists in the repository template but is not used by the slug implementation. The slug function is a pure string utility that doesn't involve any authentication, authorization, or user-related functionality.
